properties.query:
SysmonParser
| where EventID == 1
| where (ProcessName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete shadows")
    or (ProcessName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and CommandLine has "delete")
    or (ProcessName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and CommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no", "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
    or (ProcessName =~ "wmic.exe" and CommandLine has "shadowcopy delete")
| extend
    RansomwareIndicator = case(
        CommandLine has "delete shadows", "🔴 Shadow Copies Deleted",
        CommandLine has "recoveryenabled no", "🔴 Recovery Disabled",
        CommandLine has "bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures", "🔴 Boot Recovery Disabled",
        CommandLine has "shadowcopy delete", "🔴 Shadow Copies Deleted (WMI)",
        "🔴 Backup Deletion"
    ),
    ThreatLevel = "🔴 CRITICAL - Ransomware Behavior"
| project 
    TimeGenerated,
    ThreatLevel,
    RansomwareIndicator,
    Computer,
    User,
    ProcessName,
    CommandLine,
    ParentProcessName,
    IntegrityLevel
| order by TimeGenerated desc
